mnemonics.title: File Modes: R.W.A.
mnemonics.content: **R**ead existing data, **W**rite new files (overwrites!), **A**ppend to keep adding. Remember: RWA like a wrestling move - Read, Write, Append!

mnemonics.title: Context Manager Benefits
mnemonics.content: **W.I.T.H.** = **W**rites safely, **I**mplicitly closes, **T**ries to handle errors, **H**andled automatically. Always use 'with' for file operations!

mnemonics.title: IoT File Use Cases: DCBE
mnemonics.content: **D**ata logging (append sensor readings), **C**onfiguration management (read device settings), **B**uffering (cache when offline), **E**rror logging (track failures).

mnemonics.title: CSV vs JSON Choice
mnemonics.content: **C**SV for **C**olumnar time-series data (tables). **J**SON for **J**umbled nested configs (hierarchical). Pick the format that matches your data shape!

mnemonics.title: Reading Methods Trio
mnemonics.content: **read()** = ALL at once (whole file string). **readline()** = ONE line at a time. **readlines()** = LIST of all lines. Think: All, One, List.
